name: White Plains Golf Course
about: White Plains Golf Course is a public golf facility with a SkyTrak Plus golf simulator, located in Cookeville, TN. The venue offers year-round play, weather permitting, with a focus on accessibility for all players. They provide a variety of membership options, leagues, and events, along with a pro shop featuring custom club fitting services and equipment from major brands. The simulator technology and amenities are designed for both casual play and serious practice sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: SkyTrak Plus simulator offers advanced indoor play year-round
Custom club fitting services with sessions often offered at no charge
Variety of membership options and leagues for regular players
Public course with a welcoming atmosphere for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: On-site dining available with a full kitchen

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players should bring their own clubs to use with the simulator. Custom club fitting services are available on-site.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: The venue has an on-site dining kitchen, but no mention of outside food or drink policies was found.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: Standard playtime for 18 holes on a simulator typically takes 1-2 hours depending on pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, White Plains Golf Course appears to be kid-friendly as they are described as a public course that welcomes all players.
